title: Formula
text: If you have two complex numbers $$z_1=r_1\operatorname{cis}(\theta_1)$$ and $$z_2=r_2\operatorname{cis}(\theta_2)$$, $$then$$ $$\frac{z_1}{z_2}=\frac{r_1}{r_2}\operatorname{cis}(\theta_1-\theta_2).$$

title: Applying the formula
text: $$r_1=2$$, $$r_2=4$$, $$\theta_1=213$$, and $$\theta_2=33$$. Plug these into the formula above!

title: Simplifying
text: We have $$\frac{1}{2} \left(cos\left(180\right)+\operatorname{isin}\left(180\right)\right)$$ after plugging in. Evaluate the trigonometric functions and distribute for your final answer!
